mapper.select: select * from nursing_operation_record where module = #{module} and id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into nursing_operation_record (module, record_type, name, code, status, elder_name, id_card, phone, location, product_name, amount, start_date, end_date, payload, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{module}, #{recordType}, #{name}, #{code}, #{status}, #{elderName}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{location}, #{productName}, #{amount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{payload}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update nursing_operation_record set record_type = #{recordType}, name = #{name}, code = #{code}, status = #{status}, elder_name = #{elderName}, id_card = #{idCard}, phone = #{phone}, location = #{location}, product_name = #{productName}, amount = #{amount}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, payload = #{payload}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where module = #{module} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from nursing_operation_record where module = #{module} and id = #{id}
